chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 394 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.01. 2. For orders on CMA No.1863/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.1864/2024. 02.02.2026 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmad Memon, advocate for the applicant. The impugned judgment was rendered inter alia on premise that appeal was time barred. Per office objection, present reference application is also time barred. Learned counsel does not controvert either the conclusion and also admits that no application per section 5 of the Limitation Act has been filed. Accordingly, in view hereof reference application is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
